items.boundary: 247 seeds / 696 SFT rows / 2100 DPO pairs; train/dev/test = 282/207/207
items.summary: Current formal public-sample data boundary.
items.conclusion: Current data boundary only; not a model-quality claim.

items.boundary: Internal ContractCoreV2 boundary over current committed public-safe V1 contracts.
items.summary: Decision INTERNAL_V2_CORE_READY_RENDERER_PARTIAL; preserve_legacy V1 roundtrip exact 1.0; V1 evaluator metrics zero delta; derive_display support 99.77% with 5 unsupported cases.
items.conclusion: Internal architecture implementation evidence only; external BrowserTaskContract V1, training target, evaluator, predictions, and downstream runtime remain unchanged.

items.boundary: Recovered step-matched Control/Treatment prediction contracts and gold contracts; read-only slot-level analysis.
items.summary: Decision MIXED_SLOT_REPRESENTATION_REQUIRED; exact/normalized source-copyable gold slots 50.53%; typed-derivable slots 0.00%; generation-required slots 49.47%; prediction unsupported-by-source 32.17%.
items.conclusion: Analysis/design evidence only; led to the completed hybrid representation design; no training, prediction rerun, evaluator relaxation, schema/runtime migration, or model improvement claim.

items.boundary: Design-only Hybrid Slot Representation V1 over recovered step-matched slot analysis artifacts.
items.summary: Decision HYBRID_DESIGN_READY_COPY_SLICE_FIRST; overall representation coverage 100.00%; copy-backed coverage 57.32%; bounded structured coverage 31.21%; unresolved coverage 11.46%; current predictions deterministically verifiable at 51.80% and fail-closed at 48.20%.
items.conclusion: Design-only evidence; next recommended bounded change is implement-copy-backed-slot-verification-slice; no training, prediction rerun, schema/runtime migration, evaluator relaxation, or model improvement claim.

items.boundary: Offline sidecar-only verifier over recovered step-matched contracts; enabled task-scoped query/field/target only; action disabled.
items.summary: Decision COPY_SLICE_READY_FOR_SHADOW_INTEGRATION; gold unique verified span rate 86.38%; Control/Treatment source-verified prediction rate over eligible events 87.44%; provenance false accepts 0; silent fallbacks 0; V1 evaluator metric delta 0.
items.conclusion: Source provenance evidence only; next recommended bounded change is integrate-copy-backed-slot-verification-shadow-mode; no training, prediction rerun, schema/runtime migration, evaluator relaxation, action enablement, or model improvement claim.

items.boundary: Offline shadow sidecars over recovered step-matched Control/Treatment prediction contracts; one sidecar per prediction contract; no enforcement.
items.summary: Decision SHADOW_MODE_READY_FOR_REVIEW; 828/828 prediction contracts have sidecars; source-verified prediction count 376; source-verified-and-gold-correct 347; source-verified-but-gold-mismatch 29; enforcement enabled 0; action source-verified 0; V1 evaluator metric delta 0.
items.conclusion: Shadow provenance evidence only; no runtime enforcement, action enablement, training, prediction rerun, evaluator relaxation, schema migration, or model improvement claim.

items.boundary: Review-and-hardening evidence that splits gold-free OnlineShadowSidecar rows from offline EvaluationAudit rows before any prediction-pipeline shadow hook.
items.summary: Decision SHADOW_INTERFACE_READY_FOR_PREDICTION_HOOK; 828/828 online sidecars have no gold fields; 942 audit rows; trusted exact rate 87.44%; eligible verification failure rate 12.56%; false accepts, silent fallbacks, contract mutations, runtime deltas, action trusted, and normalized trusted all 0.
items.conclusion: Interface evidence only; no runtime enforcement, action enablement, evaluator change, prediction repair, training, or model improvement claim.

items.boundary: Default-off prediction-pipeline copy-backed sidecar hook over public fixture predictions; no enforcement.
items.summary: Decision PREDICTION_SHADOW_HOOK_READY_OBSERVE_ONLY; disabled/NullSink/JsonlSink prediction output hashes match; deterministic rerun true; V1 metric delta 0; trusted exact public fixture count 3; normalized candidate count 1.
items.conclusion: Observe-only prediction hook evidence; follow-up template-disjoint challenge is now blocked before observed adapter inference; no runtime enforcement, action enablement, normalized trusted provenance, evaluator change, prediction repair, training, or model improvement claim.

items.boundary: Frozen public-safe template-disjoint challenge v1 over content-hash verified recovered Control/Treatment step-matched adapters; observe-only sidecar hook.
items.summary: Decision CHALLENGE_V1_HOOK_UNSAFE_OR_INVALID; 6 Control/Treatment prediction runs; output and parsed-contract invariance across hook modes; 252 offline audit rows; source-absent false trust 3, normalization-collision false trust 6, partial-span false trust 3; no enforcement.
items.conclusion: Verifier adversarial fixture evidence only; source provenance is not semantic correctness, execution eligibility, model quality, safety readiness, production readiness, or naturalistic generalization.

items.boundary: Offline false-trust diagnosis over committed challenge rows, predictions, sidecars, audits, hook-safety audit, prediction-run audit, and frozen policy v1.
items.summary: Decision SOURCE_ATTESTATION_HARDENED_SCOPE_REDUCTION_REQUIRED; 16 source-attested-but-gold-mismatch cases; 6 normalized-equivalent collision downgrades; post-diagnosis source_attested_exact 58; execution eligible 0.
items.conclusion: Source-attestation semantics are source-only; form_fill field proposes disable, search query limited observe, extract target observe-only; next recommended change is design-copy-shadow-scope-policy-v2; no training, prediction rerun, policy v2 creation, naturalistic challenge v2, runtime enforcement, action enablement, normalized trusted provenance, or model improvement claim.

items.boundary: Recovered step-matched Control/Treatment dev/test prediction contracts and dev/test gold contracts.
items.summary: Decision PARTIAL_SCHEMA_BENEFIT; derived-field-only strict failures 14.65%; metadata-only 0%; V2 core exact improves slightly; V2 executable pass does not improve; core slot failures remain dominant.
items.conclusion: Architecture projection evidence only; not model improvement or Contract V2 implementation approval.

items.boundary: One-seed step-matched Control/Treatment SFT-only ablation with matched 3132 optimizer steps.
items.summary: Mixed / statistically inconclusive result; no stable general canonical-slot data benefit.
items.conclusion: Current latest model experiment; no DPO, no candidate-loop continuation, no adapter/checkpoint release.

items.boundary: Recovered public-safe prediction contracts and gold contracts; 207 dev rows and 207 test rows.
